summary: The diff shows that frontend/index.html was updated with a favicon link tag pointing to '/assets/generated/favicon.dim_32x32.png'. However, there is no evidence in the diff that the favicon image file was actually generated or added to the project. REQ-1 (generating the favicon) appears to be missing implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a favicon logo that represents renewable energy themes (such as sun, wind, water, or leaf elements) suitable for display in browser tabs
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image files. The ADDED FILES section lists 'none', meaning the favicon.dim_32x32.png file referenced in index.html was not actually created or added to the project.
evidence: frontend/index.html references '/assets/generated/favicon.dim_32x32.png' but this file was not added
